_meta.description: Human-curated event corrections. Applied AFTER scrapers run.

create.title: Oakley PRCA Rodeo
create.location: Oakley City Recreational Complex, 960 W Center Street, Oakley, UT 84055
create.description: Annual Oakley Independence Day PRCA Rodeo at the Oakley Outdoor Arena. Ranked among the top rodeos in the country over the July 4th holiday. Fireworks immediately follow the rodeo. Tickets available via etix.

create.title: Xtreme Bulls — Presented by Grade Tech
create.location: Oakley City Recreational Complex, 960 W Center Street, Oakley, UT 84055
create.description: Annual Xtreme Bulls competition presented by Grade Tech. Fireworks immediately follow. The culminating event of the Oakley Independence Day Celebration.

create.title: Oakley Kids Fun Run 1k & 5k
create.location: Oakley City Complex, 960 W Center Street, Oakley, UT 84055
create.description: Kids Fun Run (1k) at 7:00 AM followed by 5k at 7:30 AM. Sponsored by the South Summit Cross Country Team. Registration: $15 (10 & under), $20-25 (11 & over). T-shirt included. Begins & ends at the Oakley City Complex.

create.title: Oakley July 4th Parade
create.description: Annual Oakley Independence Day Parade along SR 32 & Center Street. Free and open to the public. Bring chairs and blankets.

create.title: Patriotic Program — Oakley Red Barn
create.description: Annual Patriotic Program held at the Oakley Red Barn — community celebration of Independence Day with music, speakers, and recognition of veterans.

create.title: Jr. Rodeo & Kid's Activities
create.location: Oakley Outdoor Arena, 960 W Center Street, Oakley, UT 84055
create.description: Junior Rodeo and Kids Activities at the Oakley Outdoor Arena. Treasure Dig, Arena Race, and Chicken Chase are free and open to the public for ages 12 & under. Sheep & Steer riding to follow.

create.title: Oakley Rodeo Men's Slack Events
create.description: Men's slack events ahead of the Oakley PRCA Rodeo: Tie Down, Steer Wrestling, and Team Roping at the Oakley Outdoor Arena.

create.title: Oakley Rodeo Women's Slack Events
create.description: Women's slack events ahead of the Oakley PRCA Rodeo: Barrels and Breakaway at the Oakley Outdoor Arena.

create.title: 3rd Annual Oakley Pickleball Tournament
create.location: Oakley City Recreational Complex, Oakley, UT 84055
create.description: 3rd Annual Oakley Pickleball Tournament — June 26 (Friday) and June 27 (Saturday). Registration $35 (includes first event), second event $10. Registration opened March 23rd, closes June 12th. Start times posted once brackets are made.

create.title: Tough Enough to Wear Pink Dinner & Auction
create.description: Annual Tough Enough to Wear Pink Dinner & Auction at the Oakley Red Barn — a community fundraiser raising awareness and funds for cancer research.
